tasks.empty_desc: You have no active tasks. Create one to get started.
tasks.no_results_desc: We couldn't find any tasks matching "{{query}}"
tasks.placeholder_input: Describe what you want to do in natural language...
tasks.chat_hint: Press Enter to send • Shift + Enter for new line
tasks.scroll_to_bottom: Jump to bottom and resume auto-scroll

initial_chat.prompt: Please first understand the task, and use the conversation to gradually fill in the information needed to generate the artifact.

memories.title: Memory Manager
memories.subtitle: Browse user and agent memories currently stored in the OpenViking embedded workspace.
memories.available_desc: Wudao is reading it locally through embedded mode.
memories.unavailable_desc: Please check Python, config, and model setup.
memories.total_desc: All readable memory files in the current workspace.
memories.search_placeholder: Search title, category, URI, or memory content...
memories.empty_desc: There are no persisted memories in the current OpenViking workspace yet.
memories.empty_filtered: No memories match the current filters.
memories.agent_memory_desc: Maintain a global agent memory manually. This content is injected into the context when a task starts its first planning conversation.
memories.agent_memory_placeholder:
For example:
- Always clarify goals, scope, and acceptance first
- Prefer the simplest reliable solution
- Check whether docs and tests need updates before finishing
memories.agent_memory_hint: Saving writes to `~/.wudao/profile/wudao-agent-memory.md` first, then tries to mirror it into OpenViking agent memory.
memories.agent_memory_saved: Wudao Agent global memory has been saved. New task conversations will inject it automatically.
memories.agent_memory_saved_with_warning: Memory was saved to Wudao, but mirroring to OpenViking failed: {{error}}
memories.agent_memory_save_failed: Failed to save Wudao Agent memory
memories.agent_memory_load_failed: Failed to load Wudao Agent memory
memories.user_memory_desc: Record your personal background, long-term preferences, and collaboration habits. It is injected into every task's first planning conversation.
memories.user_memory_placeholder:
For example:
- I prefer responses in Chinese
- I often work on middleware and infrastructure projects
- I prefer conclusions first, then details
memories.user_memory_hint: Saving writes to `~/.wudao/profile/user-memory.md` and tries to mirror it into OpenViking user memory.
memories.user_memory_saved: User memory has been saved. New task conversations will inject it automatically.
memories.user_memory_saved_with_warning: User memory was saved to Wudao, but mirroring to OpenViking failed: {{error}}

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.usage_load_failed: Unable to load usage right now. Please try again later.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.subtitle: Showing the primary artifact file: AGENTS.md
artifacts.description: Task goals, constraints, and execution hints
artifacts.empty_title: AGENTS.md has not been generated yet
artifacts.empty_hint: Generate it from the AI chat panel on the left
artifacts.empty_desc: Generate it from the AI chat panel on the left

terminal.title: Task Terminal
terminal.no_linked_sessions: No linked terminals yet. Historical sessions will appear here.
terminal.session_opened: This session is already open in the terminal area
terminal.empty_with_history: No terminals are currently open. Restore a previous session above or start a new one.
terminal.empty_without_history: No terminal has been started yet. Launch one below to begin working.
terminal.initial_prompt: Please read AGENTS.md in the current directory first, then start working with the goals and constraints in mind.

terminal_panel.title: Task Terminal
terminal_panel.no_linked_sessions: No linked terminals yet. Historical sessions will appear here.
terminal_panel.session_open_title: This session is already open in the terminal area
terminal_panel.empty_with_history: No terminals are currently open. Restore a previous session above, or start a new one.
terminal_panel.empty_without_history: The terminal has not started yet. Use the button below to begin.
